title: Can YouTube videos help robots learn household chores?
description: Training robots to perform physical tasks is much more complicated than training artificial intelligence to write a paper.

title: SoftBank and AEP plan massive Ohio gas-fired AI data center campus
description: America and Japan are joining forces for a huge project in Ohio. A massive gas-fired power plant and an artificial intelligence data center will be built on federal land. This partnership aims to boost US AI capabilities and energy security. The deal involves significant Japanese investment and aims to reduce reliance on China for electronic components.

title: Blackstone Private Credit Fund has first monthly loss since 2022
description: BCRED is among a number of private credit vehicles that have faced elevated redemptions in recent quarters, amid concerns about valuations and underwriting standards in credit markets, as well as the potential for artificial intelligence to disrupt software businesses.
content:
Blackstone Inc.’s flagship private credit fund posted its first monthly loss in more than three years, one of the clearest signs yet of weakening performance in the $1.8 trillion market.

title: Pentagon to adopt Palantir AI as core US military system, memo says
description: Palantir's Maven artificial intelligence system will become an official program of record, Deputy Secretary of Defense Steve Feinberg ​said in a letter to Pentagon leaders, a move ​that locks in long-term use of Palantir's weapons-targeting technology across the US military.

title: Pentagon to adopt Palantir AI as core US military system, memo says
description: The US military is officially adopting Palantir's Maven artificial intelligence system. This move secures long-term use of the technology for weapons targeting. Maven analyzes battlefield data to identify threats. The system will be integrated across all military branches. This decision aims to enhance warfighting capabilities and decision-making. The program is expected to be fully implemented by September.
